# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_cognitivesearch (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the Azure Cognitive Search service. Search service names must only contain lowercase letters, digits or dashes. Cannot use dash as the first two or last one characters. Cannot contain consecutive dashes. Must be between 2 and 60 characters in length. Search service names must be globally unique. You cannot change the service name after the service is created.
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group within the current subscription.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `hosting_mode` (String) Applicable only for the standard3 SKU. You can set this property to enable up to 3 high density partitions that allow up to 1000 indexes. For the standard3 SKU, the value is either 'default' or 'highDensity'. For all other SKUs, this value must be 'default'.
- `identity` (String) The identity for the resource.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Valid azure location. Defaults to location of the resource group.
- `network_rule_set` (String) Network specific rules that determine how the Azure Cognitive Search service may be reached.
- `partition_count` (Number) The number of partitions in the search service. It can be `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `6`, or `12`. Values greater than 1 are only valid for standard SKUs. For 'standard3' services with hostingMode set to 'highDensity', the allowed values are between 1 and 3.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `public_network_access` (String) This value can be set to `enabled` to avoid breaking changes on existing customer resources and templates. If set to `enabled`, traffic over public interface is not allowed, and private endpoint connections would be the exclusive access method.
- `replica_count` (Number) The number of replicas in the search service. It must be a value between 1 and 12 inclusive for *sku=standard*. It must be a value between 1 and 3 inclusive for *sku=basic*.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sku` (String) The SKU of the Search Service, which determines price tier and capacity limits. This property is required when creating a new Search Service.
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the search instance. Set to `present` to create or update a search instance. Set to `absent` to remove a search instance.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
